name: Norman Luboff
description: American conductor, choir director, music arranger (1917–1987)
abstract: Norman Luboff (May 14, 1917 – September 22, 1987) was an American choir director, music arranger, and music publisher. Luboff was the founder and conductor of the Norman Luboff Choir, one of the leading choral groups of the 1950s and '60s.

about_quotes.speaker: Charles "Creole Charlie" Levy
about_quotes.evidence: Dick Noel of NBC's Breakfast Club, he recorded, this was about two years ago, and they recorded in Hollywood with Norman Luboff's Choir Byers. A beautiful record.
